## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Mohitdeep Singh for the AI Engineer (Applied AI Scientist) role.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Deep Experience:** 8+ years in analytics, with a strong background in signal processing (audio classification at Radio/Pandora) and recommendation systems (Pinterest/Roku).](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**Recent GenAI Focus:** At Coupang, led a RAG-based product recommender (19% engagement lift) and used LLM agents for fraud detection feature engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [**Proposed Quality System:** For GrowthX, outlined a multi-agent system to score content on 5 pillars (factuality, structure, SEO, style, engagement) and improve it with RL.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [**Cultural Fit:** Seeks an innovative, remote-first environment open to state-of-the-art approaches, aligning with GrowthX's described culture.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3892.0)

## Topics

### Professional Background

  - [**Intel (Research Intern):** Researched CNN pipelines for Intel chips using legacy code.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Radio (Data Scientist):** Built a collaborative filtering algorithm for real-time audio personalization.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Method:** Classified music genres from audio signals using spectrograms.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Pandora (Data Scientist):** Evolved the audio classification system.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [**Method:** Used CNNs on spectrograms and textual analysis on lyrics for a dual-channel recommendation system.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Pinterest (Data Scientist):** Improved the home feed ranking system.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Solved cold-start problems for new users.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**Method:** Integrated CNN-transformer models with visual embeddings and used approximate nearest neighbor search for retrieval.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**Roku (Data Scientist):** Built audience segmentation and propensity models for ad targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [**Method:** Used XGBoost and Logistic Regression for daily batch predictions.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The Logistic Regression model provided a probability score, while its regression slope helped the ad team understand the revenue trade-off for different probability thresholds.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Recent GenAI & LLM Projects

  - [**Coupang (AI Engineer):** Led the design of a distributed data engine and feature store (Delta Lake) to solve data infrastructure challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [**Product Recommender (Coupang):**](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
      - [**Problem:** Slow, generic recommendations with cold-start issues.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
      - [**Solution:** A two-stage RAG system:](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
        1.  [**Candidate Generation:** Semantic retrieval from a vector DB (using Firecrawl/Bing Search) for product summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
        2.  [**Ranking:** A GRU model on clickstream data to sequence and rank candidates.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
      - [**Refinement:** Fine-tuned a distilled model (5.4B params, 8 LoRA layers) on 100M records to improve recommendation quality.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2468.0)
      - [**Outcome:** 19% lift in new product engagement; 11-month project with a 3-person team.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2593.0)
  - [**Fraud Detection (Coupang):**](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
      - [**Problem:** Detect behavioral anomalies in transaction data in seconds.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
      - [**LLM Role:** Used LLM agents for feature engineering and flagging anomalies, rather than direct detection.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Agents analyze patterns (e.g., tone mismatches, "hallucination facts") in system-generated text to identify fraudulent structures.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)

### GrowthX Case Study: Content Quality System

  - [**Goal:** Design a system to score and improve GrowthX's long-form content.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [**Proposed Framework:** A multi-agent system scoring content on 5 pillars:](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2829.0)
    1.  **Factuality & Accuracy:**
          - [**Method:** Extract entities (numbers, nouns) from the prompt and generated text.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2995.0)
          - [**Metric:** Compare entity counts; use TER score to measure edit distance.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=2995.0)
    2.  **Structure & Coherence:**
          - [**Method:** Evaluate logical flow between entities.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3140.0)
          - [**Metric:** Use Flesch-Kincaid score to measure readability.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3202.0)
    3.  **SEO & Keyword Coverage:**
          - [**Method:** Check for primary/secondary keyword presence and density.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3524.0)
    4.  **Brand Voice & Style:**
          - [**Method:** Use embedding similarity against brand examples.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3353.0)
          - [**Refinement:** Fine-tune a small model (2.5B-3.5B params) with LoRA for paraphrasing to align with the brand's vocabulary.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3436.0)
    5.  **Engagement Propensity:**
          - [**Method:** Train a classifier (e.g., XGBoost) on historical data (traffic, time-on-page) to predict future performance.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3501.0)
  - [**System Improvement with Reinforcement Learning (RL):**](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)
      - [**Environment:** The content quality scores.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3697.0)
      - [**Actions:** Rewrite, simplify, research, add citations.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3697.0)
      - [**Rewards:** Increased readability, higher keyword scores, decreased hallucination count.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3720.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Incorporate editor feedback as a reward signal to accelerate learning.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=3767.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Taka:** Contact Mohit within a few days to discuss the next round.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=4020.0)
  - [**Next Round:** Likely includes meeting more team members and a take-home assignment.](https://fathom.video/share/eKCGLi3Zm8YpS6M7mZcEjfhaBfMud84s?tab=summary&timestamp=4020.0)
